items.title: The Ethereum Foundation unveils new 'Clear Signing' standard to stop users from approving malicious crypto transactions
items.summary: The move comes after billions in losses from phishing attacks and wallet drains, with Ethereum pushing to make transaction approvals safer and easier to understand.

items.title: Bitcoin will 'explode' past $90,000 and hit $126,000, Arthur Hayes says
items.summary: Arthur Hayes, the BitMEX co-founder who now runs Maelstrom, said bitcoin's return to its October high is a "foregone conclusion," and he is taking his fund to maximum risk, with HYPE, ZEC, and NEAR as his top altcoin picks.

items.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve governor, with chair vote expected
items.summary: The US Senate voted largely along partisan lines to confirm Kevin Warsh as a member of the Fed's Board of Governors, despite many Democrats’ concerns about the central bank’s independence.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: XRP tops bitcoin, ether volumes on major South Korean exchanges
items.summary: XRP/KRW was the most traded pair on Upbit and second on Bithumb, a familiar Korean market signal that has often preceded sharper moves in the token.

items.title: Bitcoin back above $81,000 after hot CPI print, BNB, DOGE lead majors gains
items.summary: Bitcoin rolled back to $81,200 after dipping to $79,800 on Tuesday's hotter-than-expected U.S. inflation reading, while BNB zoomed 2.5% over 24 hours and dogecoin added 1.3% as crypto funds saw their strongest weekly inflows in months.

items.title: Nevada regulators push back after prediction market conference blames them for move
items.summary: Spokesperson for regulator denies that it put pressure on ARIA Resort & Casino for hosting Predict 2026

items.title: Legend becomes latest DeFi app to throw in towel
items.summary: “The product that wins isn’t the one that explains crypto better, it’s the one that hides it completely,” said CEO Jayson Hobby.

items.title: Hyperliquid ETF attracts $1.2M inflows in 'very solid' US debut
items.summary: 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF debuted in the US to a “very solid day” of trading, despite volumes being below comparatively buzzy crypto ETF debuts.

items.title: CFTC backs prediction market Kalshi in appeals court fight against Ohio
items.summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has urged the Sixth Circuit Court of Appeals to rule that the agency has jurisdiction over prediction markets.

items.title: Ethereum community launches security feature to end blind signing
items.summary: Crypto platforms Ledger, Trezor, MetaMask, Keycard, WalletConnect, Argot and Fireblocks are among the earliest adopters and contributors to Clear Signing, aimed at ending “blind signing.”

items.title: Kelp DAO eyes reopening withdrawals after rsETH burn
items.summary: Kelp DAO has burned the exploiter’s tokens and outlined a two-week plan to refill rsETH through Aave’s Recovery Guardian multisig wallet.

items.title: Iran war, AI spending could push Bitcoin back to $126K this year: Hayes
items.summary: Arthur Hayes said military spending and the possible prioritization of infrastructure investment by US allies over trading US Treasurys and equities will lead to further fiat printing and benefit crypto.

items.title: US senators file over 100 amendments to crypto bill ahead of markup
items.summary: A leaked list shows Senate Banking Committee members have filed more than 100 amendments to a crypto bill, highlighting the issues likely to be debated at a markup on Thursday.

items.title: JPMorgan to launch tokenized money market fund for stablecoin issuers
items.summary: JPMorgan’s filing comes nearly three weeks after rival investment bank Morgan Stanley launched its own money market fund, the Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio.

items.title: Go fuzzing was missing half the toolkit. We forked the toolchain to fix it.
items.summary: Go’s native fuzzing is useful, but it stands far behind state-of-the-art tooling that the Rust, C, and C++ ecosystems offer with LibAFL and AFL++. Path constraints are hard to solve. Structured inputs usually need handmade parsing. It doesn’t even detect several common bug classe

items.title: JPMorgan files to launch new tokenized fund as Wall Street tokenization race heats up
items.summary: The global banking giant is expanding its tokenized money market lineup, following BlackRock's similar move just a few days ago.

items.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to Fed board ahead of expected Chair vote
items.summary: Warsh’s confirmation to the Fed board positions the crypto-linked investor to replace Jerome Powell as chair amid inflation and digital asset policy debates.

items.title: Stablecoin yield infrastructure project raises $13.5M in round led by Sky Ecosystem
items.summary: Osero is coming with three products: Earn, App, and Foundry.

items.title: Privacy emerges as crypto’s next 'killer app,' with Arc, Canton and Tempo topping $1 billion in funding
items.summary: New fundraising rounds for three institution-focused blockchains show how regulation, privacy and corporate competition are reshaping crypto infrastructure, according to Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan.
